question: State of the insulin signalling — CDK4 literature in metabolic disease
provenance: 2 of 13 records are REAL Crossref-resolvable DOIs (the seed 2015 JCI paper retracted in 2023, plus a real Physiological Reviews paper). The remaining 11 are ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic records (doi prefix 10.1038/insulin-*, marked illustrative:true) that demonstrate the detectors on a known pattern without claiming to be real publications. Keystone labels them as such in the UI; it never presents a synthetic DOI as a real one.
